report: Phase 12.12 — GSC Shared Action Plan Draft
warning: No actions should be taken until Qasem reviews this report and provides approval.

no_action_cleanup_lag.description: All noindexed scenarios, geo pages, and formula tool variants — Google will naturally drop these

no_action_correct_canonical_or_redirect.description: 33 canonical alternates + 1 redirect — all expected behavior

internal_linking_improvement.description: Increase internal links FROM indexed pages (decision pages, blog posts) TO core calculators and other important pages
priority: Add links from all 15 decision pages to their related calculators
Add inline contextual links from blog posts to calculators
Ensure homepage links to all 10 core calculators

content_improvement.description: If any of the 5 crawled-not-indexed pages are valuable, improve content depth, add calculations, add EEAT signals

canonical_fix.description: No canonical issues detected. All 33 canonical alternates are expected.

sitemap_fix.description: All 651 sitemap URLs are appropriate. Core calculators are in sitemap.

request_indexing_consideration.description: 10 core calculators need Google to crawl them. However, the GSC API Indexing endpoint is INVALID for normal pages (only for JobPosting/BroadcastEvent).
request_indexing_consideration.alternative: Manual URL Inspection request in GSC web UI — Qasem can request indexing for these 10 URLs manually

sitemap_resubmission.description: Resubmit sitemap.xml to GSC to prompt Google to re-process it. The 4 "URL unknown to Google" calculators suggest Google may not have fully processed the current sitemap.

priority_action_order: 1. Qasem to manually request indexing for 10 core calculators via GSC URL Inspection tool
3. Improve internal linking from indexed decision pages to core calculators (code change)
4. Deploy internal linking changes to Vercel
5. Qasem to export 5 404 URLs + 5 crawled-not-indexed URLs from shared reports for investigation
6. Wait 7 days for Google to process changes and re-crawl
